blocks.body: Past Continuous: Negatives — wasn't / weren't + verb-ing w przeczeniach w przeszłości.

{"level":"A2","intro":"W przeczeniach Past Continuous używamy was not / were not albo krótkich form wasn't / weren't i zostawiamy formę verb-ing.","rules":[{"label":"wasn't / weren't","color":"emerald","text":"Zapamiętaj krótkie formy do codziennego angielskiego.","example":"I wasn't sleeping. / They weren't working."},{"label":"Keep -ing","color":"blue","text":"Po was / were główny czasownik zostaje w formie -ing.","example":"She wasn't reading. / We weren't waiting."},{"label":"Ta sama idea, inny podmiot","color":"amber","text":"Używaj wasn't z I / he / she / it i weren't z you / we / they.","example":"He wasn't cooking. / They weren't cooking."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele","intro":"Po was / were zostaw czasownik z -ing.","items":[{"label":"I / he / she / it","title":"was not / wasn't + verb-ing","subtitle":"I wasn't listening. / She wasn't sleeping."},{"label":"you / we / they","title":"were not / weren't + verb-ing","subtitle":"We weren't waiting. / They weren't coming."},{"label":"Full form","title":"was not / were not","subtitle":"He was not working. / They were not talking."},{"label":"Contrast","title":"was reading → wasn't reading","subtitle":"W przeczeniu -ing zostaje."}]}

{"title":"2. Po co są przeczenia","sections":[{"label":"Czynność nie trwała","color":"emerald","description":"Pokaż, że czynność nie działa się w tamtym momencie w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"I wasn't sleeping at 11 p.m.","ua":"Czynność wtedy nie trwała."},{"en":"They weren't waiting outside.","ua":"Przecząca czynność w trakcie."}]},{"label":"Kontrast","color":"blue","description":"Porównuj to, co się działo, z tym, co się nie działo.","examples":[{"en":"She was cooking, but she wasn't listening to music.","ua":"Jedna czynność trwała, druga nie."},{"en":"We were studying, but we weren't writing notes.","ua":"Wyraźny kontrast."}]},{"label":"Jedna forma be dla grupy podmiotów","color":"amber","description":"Nie myl was i were.","examples":[{"en":"He wasn't working.","ua":"wasn't z he"},{"en":"They weren't working.","ua":"weren't z they"}]}]}

{"title":"3. Twierdzenie i przeczenie","intro":"Porównaj model pozytywny i negatywny.","rows":[{"en":"I was reading at 9 p.m.","ua":"I wasn't reading at 9 p.m.","note":"was → wasn't"},{"en":"She was waiting for the bus.","ua":"She wasn't waiting for the bus.","note":"-ing zostaje"},{"en":"They were working at that time.","ua":"They weren't working at that time.","note":"were → weren't"}],"warning":"Nie mów She wasn't read ani They wasn't waiting."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Usuwanie -ing w przeczeniu.","wrong":"❌ He wasn't work at that moment.","right":"✅ He wasn't working at that moment."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie wasn't z they / we / you.","wrong":"❌ They wasn't sleeping.","right":"✅ They weren't sleeping."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Budowanie przeczenia bez be.","wrong":"❌ We not waiting when she called.","right":"✅ We weren't waiting when she called."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenie w Past Continuous = wasn't / weren't + verb-ing.","Używaj wasn't z I / he / she / it.","Używaj weren't z you / we / they.","W przeczeniu forma -ing zostaje."]}
